why_safe: This halves the coarsest recommendation loop cadence without introducing a claim of ultra-fast trading.
This reduces game-state staleness materially while avoiding a full collapse of cache TTL to near-zero.
This leaves book-cache sharpness unchanged at 5 seconds, limiting additional CLOB/API churn.
No strategy logic, model weights, or recommendation schema were changed.
No new live data source was introduced and Odds API usage was not increased.
runtime_risks: more timeout/churn exposure if upstream providers are unstable

proof_of_work.game_state_service_old_to_new: GAME_STATE_CACHE_TTL default changed from 15 to 8 and the file docstring was updated to match the new truthful default
